title: Perler Fused Bead Activity Kit-My Little Pony
features: This Perler fused bead set comes with 2,000 beads, 2 pegboards (small interlocking squares), pattern sheet with instructions, and ironing paper
Features 5 My Little Pony Perler bead patterns, including Sunny Starscout, Izzy Moonbow, Pipp Petals, and more
Perler beads make a wonderful kid's craft activity that encourage the development of fine motor skills, color and pattern recognition, imaginative play, creativity, and more
Made from LDPE, a food-grade plastic that's free of harmful chemicals, Perler bead projects are the perfect choice for fun, creative, and safe play
Designed for ages 6 and up, and ironing to be done by an adult only; ironing paper, pegboard, and Snappix canvas not included
description: Create lovable characters from Hasbro's My Little Pony, including Sunny Starscout, Izzy Moonbow, Pipp Petals, and more with this Perler fused bead activity kit! Not only do Perler projects promote fine motor skills, color recognition, planning, and more, kid's can also express their creativity and imagination by making customized creations of their own; a perfect weekend craft activity for kids and parents! This activity kit makes a great gift set! Comes with 2,000 beads, 2 pegboards (small interlocking squares), pattern sheet with instructions, and ironing paper for 5 total projects. Beads are made from LDPE, a food-grade plastic that's free of harmful chemicals; designed for ages 6 and up, and ironing to be done by an adult only. Copyright 2023 Hasbro. All Rights Reserved. Licensed by Hasbro.
